channel.title: SSbreakingHeadlines
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from SSbreakingHeadlines, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Grammy-nominated producer Tay Keith found dead in Nashville at 29
item.description: Record producer Tay Keith was discovered dead in his Nashville home during a welfare check, police confirmed.

item.title: David Muir recounts how a son aided his pilot father's final flight after ALS diagnosis
item.description: David Muir tells the inspiring story of a son helping his pilot father complete his retirement flight following an ALS diagnosis.

item.title: Graduates share the stage in an uplifting ceremony
item.description: A Maryland mother has extra pride on her son's graduation day as she also receives her diploma alongside him.

item.title: Murky Reflecting Pool draws tourists for unintended reasons
item.description: The Reflecting Pool's water was filled with algae, peeling paint, and white blobs on Friday.
